loadingDescription: Data is loading from the data and public/assets folders. Once ready, you can move between cards, library, favorites, tags, and settings.
emptyDescription: The tags you selected do not match any word right now. Adjust the tags or clear the filters to view every card again.
emptyTipBody: Open the tags page to adjust the active themes, or clear the filters to show the full library again.
emptySearchDescription: The current search term and tag combination returned no results. Try resetting the search or changing the selected tags.
emptySearchTipBody: Search matches Traditional Chinese, Indonesian, and English values at the same time.
settingsDescription: Choose your native language and two display languages. Cards, library, and favorites update immediately.
displayLanguage1Description: Primary language for the card headline and the first line in lists.
displayLanguage2Description: Used for translations and secondary support text.
settingsInfo: After saving, interface copy, tag names, and card translations update immediately. If English data is still missing, the app falls back safely.
languageMismatchError: Display language 1 and Display language 2 cannot be the same.
tagDescription: Choose the themes you want in this learning session. Multi-select is supported and affects cards, library, and favorites together.
favoritesDescription: This page lists every favorite term. It uses the same layout as the library and supports search, tag filters, and direct unfavorite actions.
favoritesEmptyTitle: You do not have any favorites yet
favoritesEmptyDescription: Mark important words from the library or card view as favorites, then come back here for a quick review.
favoritesEmptyTipBody: Start from the library, then save important terms with the favorite button.
